src/main/java/by/piskunou/solvdlaba/Airp.general_idea: Add @EnableTransactionManagement annotation to explicitly enable Spring's annotation-driven transaction management.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
Add Spring Boot Starter Web dependency to enable web application capabilities.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency for bean validation support.
Add MyBatis Spring Boot Starter dependency for SQL mapping framework integration.
Add Spring Boot Starter Security dependency for authentication and authorization.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI dependency for API documentation generation.
Add Spring Boot Starter Mail dependency for email sending capabilities.
Add Spring Boot Starter Freemarker dependency for template processing.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver dependency for database connectivity.
Add Liquibase Core dependency for database schema migration management.
Add Preliquibase Spring Boot Starter dependency for pre-migration tasks.
Add MapStruct dependency for type-safe bean mapping.
Add MapStruct Processor dependency for annotation processing during compilation.
Add Gson dependency for JSON serialization and deserialization.
Add Auth0 Java JWT dependency for JSON Web Token handling.
Add JUnit Jupiter API dependency for modern JUnit 5 testing.
Add JUnit Jupiter Engine dependency to run JUnit 5 tests.
Add Mockito Core dependency for mocking in unit tests.
Add Mockito JUnit Jupiter dependency for integration with JUnit 5.
Add JaCoCo Maven Plugin dependency for code coverage reporting.
Add Maven Surefire Plugin with JUnit Platform provider to execute JUnit 5 tests.
Configure JaCoCo plugin executions for agent preparation and report generation.
Remove Spring Boot DevTools dependency as it is no longer needed or desired.
Remove explicit Spring Boot Maven Plugin configuration for Lombok exclusion, relying on defaults.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add draft.sql to gitignore to prevent committing temporary SQL drafts.
Add testData.sql to gitignore to prevent committing test data files.
Add text.txt to gitignore to prevent committing temporary text files.
Ignore application.yaml files specifically within test directories to allow local test configurations.
Ignore classes named ZTestTest.java, likely temporary or generated test files.
Add .env to gitignore to prevent committing environment variables and secrets.
Remove the blanket ignore of application.yaml from the root, likely to commit the main configuration file.

mvnw.general_idea: Replace the legacy Maven Wrapper shell script with the modern version 3.3.2 to support new features like native distribution downloading and improved cross-platform compatibility.
mvnw.human_impl: diff --git a/mvnw b/mvnw ... # Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.3.2

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL in the script header from HTTPS to HTTP to match the new template or standard.

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Replace the legacy batch-only Maven Wrapper script with the modern hybrid batch/Powershell version (3.3.2) to support newer Maven distributions and features like mvnd.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Replaced entire content of mvnw.cmd with the standard Apache Maven Wrapper 3.3.2 template.
